entities.boy: a boy staring at the chess board

scenes.title: The Chess Game
scenes.background_prompt: A quiet room with a wooden chess table, two chairs, a clock on the wall, and bookshelves. Warm indoor light. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A quiet room with warm indoor light. Two boys sit at a wooden chess table. One boy, about eleven, with dark curly hair and a green polo shirt, leans forward staring at the black and white chess board with intense concentration — one hand hovers over a knight piece, hesitating, his brow deeply furrowed in thought. The chess position is complex: pieces are scattered across the board in mid-game. His opponent, a boy in a red sweater, sits back in his chair with arms folded and a patient, slightly amused half-smile, waiting. A chess clock on the table shows time ticking. Bookshelves filled with books and a few chess trophies line the wall behind them. A round wall clock shows 3:30 PM.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place boy at the chess table, leaning forward and staring at the board, one hand hovering over a knight piece, brow deeply furrowed. Place opponent sitting back with arms folded and a patient half-smile.
scenes.scene_description: On the far left of this indoor scene, a large arched wooden window looks out onto a bright, sunny garden with rolling green hills, leafy trees, and bushes dotted with small white, yellow, and blue flowers under a light blue sky with fluffy white clouds. To the right of the window stands a tall wooden bookshelf filled with numerous books in shades of red, blue, green, yellow, and brown. In front of this bookshelf, a boy with short brown hair and a focused, slightly frustrated expression sits on a wooden chair. He is wearing a green sweater with a blue collar and brown elbow patches, yellow pants, and brown boots. He leans forward over a rectangular wooden table, his right hand reaching for a yellow chess piece on a chessboard. The chessboard sits in the center of the table, populated with yellow pieces on the left and blue pieces on the right. Behind the chessboard is a small wooden chess clock with two circular faces. Above the table, a large, round, ornate wooden clock hangs on the yellow wall, its white face showing black numbers and hands pointing to approximately ten minutes past ten. To the right of the table, an opponent with short brown hair and a confident smile sits on a matching wooden chair. He wears a green striped sweater, green pants, and brown boots, with a brown satchel slung over his shoulder and his arms crossed over his chest. Behind him is another tall wooden bookshelf filled with books, and below it, a wooden cabinet with a single round knob. The entire scene is set on a floor made of light brown wooden planks.

S: sunny garden outside the arched window
large ornate clock on the wall
IE: boy reaching for a yellow chess piece
IR: feeling frustrated by the difficult move
feeling confident about winning the game
P: intending to win the chess match
A: reaching for a yellow chess piece
sitting with arms crossed across chest
CO: chess pieces positioned on the board

ENP: green sweater with brown elbow patches
tall bookshelves filled with colorful books
SC: when it is his turn to move
